docs.sidebarTagline: Everything you need to know about the game

hero.subtitle: Mundial is a football prediction game that lives on X. You reply with your score before kickoff, watch your points build on the daily leaderboard, and if you finish in the top 20 you get a share of that day's rewards paid in BNB.

overview.title: What this is
overview.p1: Mundial is a football score prediction game built around X. When we post a real fixture, you reply under that post from <xHandle>@copamundialapp</xHandle> with the score you think it will finish. Get it right and you earn points. Those points stack on a daily leaderboard, and every day the top 20 players share a pool of rewards paid in BNB.
overview.p2: We kept the barrier to entry as low as we could. You do not need to download an app or create an account just to play. A reply on X before kickoff is enough to enter. When you want to follow fixtures, check where you stand, or claim something you have won, that is what <site>mundial.xyz</site> is for.

howToPlay.title: All you do is reply on X
howToPlay.step1: @copamundialapp posts a match thread, something like Mexico vs South Africa, drop your score below, and that is your cue to join in.
howToPlay.step2: Reply with the score you are predicting before kickoff and make sure both teams are named, for example Mexico 2-1 South Africa.
howToPlay.step3: Once the match has finished we score your prediction against the real result and add the points to your total.
howToPlay.step4: Your points show up on the season leaderboard, usually within a short while after full time.
howToPlay.step5: At 10:00 UTC each day we snapshot the cumulative top 20 and open that day's USDC payout.
howToPlay.step6: If you are one of those winners you sign in with X at copamundial.app, connect a Solana wallet in the Wallet tab, and collect USDC whenever you are ready. There is no expiry on a valid win.

outcome.label: Correct outcome
outcome.note: Right winner or draw, wrong numbers

wrong.label: Wrong outcome
wrong.note: You still get a point for playing

howToPlay.scoringNote: You only receive one score per match and we count the best tier you qualify for. Your first valid reply is the one that counts, and it has to land before the scheduled kickoff.
howToPlay.scoringMarket: Get the result right and your base is multiplied by the market odds locked before kickoff — up to ×3 when you back the underdog.
howToPlay.format1: Include both team names and a score. The order does not change what we record, so <mono>Mexico 2-1 South Africa</mono> and <mono>South Africa 1-2 Mexico</mono> are treated as the same prediction.
howToPlay.format2: We recognise common nicknames for teams, but small misspellings do not count.
howToPlay.format3: If you edit your reply or post again we ignore it. The first valid reply you leave is the one that stands.

rewards.title: How the top 20 share the pool
rewards.note: Shares follow a 10 : 6 : 3.5 per-person ratio across the three tiers (100% of the pot). On a $1,500 pool that works out to about $140 / $84 / $49 per winner. On days when fewer than 20 players score, whatever is left over stays in the rewards contract and helps fund future pools. If two players finish level we give the higher rank to whoever predicted earlier.

token.title: $SCORE on BNB Smart Chain

buyback.title: Buyback and burn
buyback.body: This keeps buy pressure on the token and slowly reduces the supply over time.

payouts.title: Leaderboard payouts
payouts.body: This side of the tax helps fund the daily BNB pools that go to the best predictors on the board.

development.title: Development
development.body: This covers the running costs of the project, including API fees, charity, marketing, listings and community giveaways.

token.note: The share that goes to leaderboard payouts arrives as BNB in the rewards contract. Each day's pool is reserved on chain so anything already owed to winners stays protected.

contract.title: How payouts actually work on chain
contract.intro: Daily rewards are paid out through a dedicated smart contract on BNB Smart Chain. We kept it deliberately simple, but the contract itself sets hard limits on what can ever be paid so the rules are not just promises on a website.
contract.epochsBody: Every day at 23:00 UTC we open that day's reward pool on chain as what the contract calls an epoch, with a fixed amount of BNB set aside for that day. The contract reserves that money straight away. BNB that belongs to a day's winners cannot be spent again, moved somewhere else, or pulled out by anyone on the team. We can only open a new epoch if the contract really holds enough unreserved BNB to cover it.

verify.title: Verify
verify.body: You sign in with X at mundial.xyz and our server checks that you were a genuine top 20 finisher for that day.

authorise.title: Authorise
authorise.body: We work out your exact reward from the final leaderboard and sign a voucher for the wallet you want to use.

claim.title: Claim
claim.body: Your wallet sends that voucher to the contract, the contract checks the signature on chain, and the BNB is transferred to you.

safety.rule1: Every voucher works once. A successful claim cannot be replayed or claimed twice.
safety.rule2: The total paid out for a day can never go above the pool that was opened for that day. The contract enforces that, not us.
safety.rule3: Vouchers only work with this contract on BNB Smart Chain. They cannot be reused on another chain or another project.
safety.rule4: There is no deadline to claim. If you won, your share stays reserved until you come back and collect it.
safety.rule5: Transfers are protected against re-entrancy attacks and the contract can be paused if something serious needs to be stopped quickly.
safety.rule6: Any recovery function can only touch spare funds sitting in the contract, never BNB that is already reserved for winners.

contract.callout: <highlight>The simple version is this.</highlight> Once a day's pool has been opened on chain, that BNB is for that day's winners and the contract is what makes that true, not a line in our docs.

fixtures.title: Fixtures
fixtures.body: See which matches are coming up and check kickoff times in your own timezone.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.body: Follow daily standings and how your season points are building.

signIn.title: Sign in with X
signIn.body: Your predictions and any rewards you win stay tied to the X account you sign in with.

wallet.title: Wallet and claim
wallet.body: Connect a BNB Smart Chain wallet when you are ready and claim rewards you have already won.

community.title: Community and growth
community.intro: The leaderboard is the centre of the game, but it is not the only reason to stick around and it is not the only way to earn. We want an active community where people actually get rewarded for showing up, and that has been part of the plan from the start.

telegram.title: Daily AMAs
telegram.body: We run a daily AMA in our Telegram group where you can ask the team anything you want to know.

xSpaces.title: X Spaces
xSpaces.body: We host live Spaces on @copamundialapp a few times a week when there is something worth talking through together.

community.earnIntro: If you miss the top 20 on the board, that is not the end of the story. Part of the development allocation goes back into the community as BNB rewards, including things like

earn.quizzes: Regular quizzes where winners can pick up BNB prizes.
earn.activeMember: Active member rewards for people who consistently add something useful to the community.
earn.bounty: Bounty app coming soon, which is our own bounty site where we post tasks for the community, and strong submissions or content that travels well can earn BNB.

community.callout: You do not have to finish in the top 20 every day to earn here. Quizzes, community rewards and bounties are funded from the development side of the token tax.

links.title: Official links
links.trustNote: Please only trust links that come from <xHandle>@copamundialapp</xHandle> or that you see on mundial.xyz itself. Our admins will never message you first in a DM.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: Mundial is a skill based prediction game. Nothing on this site or in anything we publish is financial advice, investment advice, legal advice, or gambling advice, and nothing here should be read as an offer to buy any asset. Whether you can take part depends on where you live, so please check your local rules. We are not affiliated with FIFA or with any league or club. Crypto prices move quickly, so only take part with money you can afford to lose. Rewards depend on how the game runs, what results come in, and what funds are available at the time. Do your own research.

faq.subtitle: Search FAQs about playing, points, payouts, or $SCORE…
faq.noResults: No questions match your search. Try different words or browse all questions below.

whatIs.question: What is Mundial?
whatIs.answer: A free skill-based football prediction game. Reply on X with your score before kickoff, earn points, climb the cumulative leaderboard. Top 20 at the daily 10:00 UTC snapshot can win USDC on Solana. No wallet needed to play — only to collect prizes.

isGambling.question: Is this gambling?
isGambling.answer: It’s a skill-based prediction game, not a sportsbook. Not financial or gambling advice. Eligibility varies by region — check your local laws. Full disclaimer: mundial.xyz/disclaimer

fifaAffiliation.question: Are you affiliated with FIFA or any club/league?
fifaAffiliation.answer: No. We are not affiliated with FIFA, any league, or any club.

needWalletToPlay.question: Do I need crypto or a wallet to play?
needWalletToPlay.answer: No. You only need X to predict and earn points. Connect Phantom, Solflare, or Backpack on Solana only when collecting USDC after finishing in the top 20.

howToPlay.question: How do I play?
howToPlay.answer: 1) Sign in at copamundial.app with X. 2) Check matches on the Fixtures tab. 3) Reply on the @copamundialapp match post with your score BEFORE kickoff — not in the app. Example: Netherlands 2-1 Uzbekistan. 4) Points update after full time. 5) If you are in the cumulative top 20 at the 10:00 UTC snapshot, collect USDC in the Wallet tab.

whereToPost.question: Where do I post my prediction?
whereToPost.answer: As a reply on the official @copamundialapp match post for that fixture. Not on random tweets.

deadline.question: What’s the deadline?
deadline.answer: Before kickoff (UTC). Replies at or after kickoff do not count.

changePrediction.question: Can I change my prediction?
changePrediction.answer: Your first valid pre-kickoff reply on that match post counts. Only one reply per X account per match.

replyNotCounted.question: Why wasn’t my reply counted?
replyNotCounted.answer: Usually: replied after kickoff, wrong thread, unreadable score format, no match post yet, or match cancelled. Include your @handle, match, and reply link if you need help.

extraTime.question: Do extra time or penalties count?
extraTime.answer: No. We use 90 minutes + injury time only. ET and pens do not change your points.

pointsScoring.question: How does scoring work?
pointsScoring.answer: Exact score = 5 pts. Correct result (winner/draw, wrong score) = 3 pts. Wrong result = 1 pt. When you get the result right, base points are multiplied by the market odds locked before kickoff — up to ×3 when you back the underdog. Valid predictions before kickoff always get at least 1 pt when the match is scored.

pointsUpdated.question: When are points updated?
pointsUpdated.answer: After the match finishes and we have the final 90+ injury time score. Points and the leaderboard usually update automatically within about 15 minutes of full time — refresh the app if you don’t see them yet.

leaderboard.question: How does the leaderboard work?
leaderboard.answer: One rank per X account. Total points = sum of all scored matches across the season. Higher points = higher rank. The board does not reset daily or every 3 days.

whoGetsPaid.question: Who wins prizes?
whoGetsPaid.answer: Only the top 20 on the cumulative leaderboard at the daily 10:00 UTC snapshot qualify for that day's USDC payout.

snapshotWhen.question: When is the snapshot?
snapshotWhen.answer: Every day at 10:00 UTC. That locks the top 20 for that calendar day's USDC payout on Solana.

prizeSplit.question: How is the prize pool split?
prizeSplit.answer: Top 20 split the full daily pool at a 10 : 6 : 3.5 per-person ratio — Ranks 1–3: ~9.3% each. Ranks 4–10: ~5.6% each. Ranks 11–20: ~3.3% each. On a $1,500 pool that’s about $140, $84, and $49 per winner.

poolSize.question: How big is the daily pool?
poolSize.answer: The daily USDC pool depends on what is funded in the Solana rewards vault at snapshot time. Amounts vary and are not guaranteed.

howToClaim.question: How do I claim?
howToClaim.answer: Sign in with the same X account → Wallet tab (connect Phantom, Solflare, or Backpack on Solana) → Collect your USDC reward. Keep a small amount of SOL for transaction fees.

claimEmpty.question: I’m Top 20 but Claim is empty — why?
claimEmpty.answer: Check that the 10:00 UTC snapshot has run, you are signed in with the correct X account, and the payout epoch is open on Solana. Contact support with screenshots if it persists.

whatIsScoreToken.question: What is $SCORE?
whatIsScoreToken.answer: $SCORE is the project token on BSC, launched on flap.sh. You do not need to buy or hold $SCORE to play. DYOR — this is not financial advice.

scoreTaxSplit.question: Where do $SCORE taxes go?
scoreTaxSplit.answer:
• 40% → buyback & burn $SCORE
• 40% → daily leaderboard winner payouts (BNB)
• 20% → development

The payout and development shares (60% total) flow through the Flap split vault, split 67/33.

scoreConnectsGame.question: How does $SCORE connect to the game?
scoreConnectsGame.answer: The vault’s 67% share (40% of all taxes) helps fund daily BNB prizes for top-20 winners. Amounts vary daily based on trading volume and setup.

needHelp.question: I need help — what should I send?
needHelp.answer: Your @X handle, match + date, link to your reply (predictions) or screenshot (wallet/claim issues).

claim.claimWcBusy: Confirm on your phone, then return to this browser tab immediately and keep it open until the claim finishes.
claim.linkingWallet: Linking this MetaMask address for payouts…

switchXAccount.title: Switch X account
switchXAccount.body: X keeps you logged in across tabs. To use a different account, open X and switch accounts there first, then come back.
